Looking at the class diagram, `MermaidValidationPipeline` has a composition relationship with `QualityValidator` (via `MermaidValidationPipeline *-- QualityValidator`), and the `validate` method on `MermaidValidationPipeline` is described as calling into the validation pipeline.

The call graph snippet provided is truncated ("and 325 more call edges"), so I can't see the specific edges for `MermaidValidationPipeline` → `QualityValidator` calls directly from the call graph section.

From the class definition, `MermaidValidationPipeline` has these methods: `validate`, `validateFull`, `calculateOverall`, `getParseValidator`, `generateReport`, `summarize`. The `QualityValidator` is one of the four validators composed into the pipeline, so it would be invoked during the validation flow.

However, since I can only base my answer on what's explicitly represented in the provided data — and the call graph is truncated before showing those edges — I cannot confirm specific method-to-method calls between these two classes.
